title: Quarantine State
description: Schema for quarantine.json stored on the quarantine/state branch. Contains only active quarantine entries (tests currently quarantined). Entries are removed when the associated GitHub Issue is closed.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update to this file.

tests.description: Map of quarantined tests, keyed by test_id (file_path::classname::name).

file_path.description: File path component extracted from JUnit XML (framework-specific).

classname.description: Class name from the JUnit XML classname attribute.

name.description: Test name from the JUnit XML name attribute.

suite.description: Test suite name (typically the classname or describe block).

first_flaky_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the first time this test was detected as flaky.

last_flaky_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent flaky detection for this test.

flaky_count.description: Number of times this test has been detected as flaky.

issue_number.description: GitHub Issue number tracking this flaky test.

issue_url.description: Full URL to the GitHub Issue tracking this flaky test.

quarantined_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this test was quarantined.

quarantined_by.description: Who or what quarantined this test (e.g., 'cli-auto').
